title: macropsychanthus ferrugineus
intro: Macropsychanthus ferrugineus is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to Australia. It is a shrub or small tree that is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Macropsychanthus ferrugineus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use by making a decoction or infusion of the leaves or bark, which can be used to treat various health issues.
